taxonomy: Ophiostachys virginica is classified as a type of flowering plant, specifically a species of yucca. It belongs to the family Asparagaceae, which includes a wide range of plants such as asparagus and agaves. Within this family, it is further categorized under the subfamily Asparagoideae. Further classification places it in the genus Yucca, which includes many species of shrub-like plants native to the Americas. Ophiostachys virginica is often considered synonymous with Yucca virginica, reflecting its close relationship to other yucca species.
